name: Luxmon

signature_move.name: Pico Knuckle
signature_move.description: A fist technique where it imitatesAngemon, whom it aspires to be, to the best of its ability.

description: An Angel Digimon with a small, child-like body that belongs to the lowest rank among angels. It is often teased by Impmon and Pico Devimon , possibly because of its pure, innocent nature which makes it incapable of seeing through lies. It does not possess much power due to it being a Child, but once in battle, it is able to demonstrate its true strength in fighting against superior opponents by working together with other Luxmon. Its Special Move is a fist technique where it imitates Angemon , whom it aspires to be, to the best of its ability ( Pico Knuckle ). Its " Cloud Barrier ", in which it deploys a circular shield of light around it, increases its defensive power manyfold when deployed by several Luxmon at the same time.
